task_completion.visual_evidence: PyMOL window is open with the 1BKV structure loaded, visible in the right-hand object panel or command history.

task_completion.description: Color the three polypeptide chains distinctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The collagen triple helix in the PyMOL viewer shows three distinct colors corresponding to chains A, B, and C.

task_completion.description: Show Glycines as spheres and Hydroxyprolines as sticks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the PyMOL viewer, the core Glycine residues are rendered as spheres (space-filling), and the Hydroxyproline (HYP) residues are rendered as sticks.

task_completion.description: Measure the distance between adjacent Glycine C-alpha atoms across chains.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashed measurement line with a distance value (typically between 3.4 and 6.0 Angstroms) is visible connecting two Glycine residues on different chains in the PyMOL viewer.

task_completion.description: Save the cross-sectional visualization to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of saving the image to '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/collagen_core.png', such as a PyMOL command 'png /home/ga/PyMOL_Data/images/collagen_core.png' or the file visible in a file manager/terminal.

task_completion.description: Write the quantitative report with residue counts and distance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the creation of '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/collagen_report.txt' containing counts for Glycine, Hydroxyproline (e.g., 21), and the measured Gly-Gly distance.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with PyMOL to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the PyMOL GUI or PyMOL command line being actively used to load, manipulate, and measure the structure, rather than just writing a script blindly.

integrity.description: Measurement was actually performed in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The distance measurement is visually confirmed in the PyMOL viewer with a dashed line and label, rather than just being hallucinated or typed directly into the report.

integrity.description: Report is written to the correct file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is saved to the exact requested path '/home/ga/PyMOL_Data/collagen_report.txt' using a text editor or shell redirection, not just echoed to the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target PDB ID is 1BKV. The true number of modeled Hydroxyproline (HYP) residues in 1BKV is exactly 21. The true distance between adjacent Glycine C-alpha atoms across chains (e.g., A3 and B33) is approximately 3.44 Å.
